summary: HTTP module had zero documentation. Filled all gaps: comprehensive modules.md section (actions, provider, signing, streaming, security), 5 good_to_know.md entries for new patterns, XML doc comments on all 5 public API files, and CHANGELOG. No flagged items for coder or tester.

changes.description: Added HTTP module to built-in handlers table and wrote detailed section covering all 4 actions, provider pattern, signing integration, streaming, uploads, security limits, error keys, header merging, and types
Added 5 pattern entries: IHttpProvider in Engine.Providers, TransportPropertyFilter [In]/[Out], ISettings→IConfig rename, IConfigure<T> build-time defaults, Path moved to Engine/FileSystem
Added class-level and property-level XML docs for all 11 public properties
Added class-level and property-level XML docs for all 8 public properties
Added class-level and property-level XML docs for all 10 public properties
Added class-level and property-level XML docs for all 9 public properties
Added XML docs for 8 properties missing docs (2 already documented: MaxResponseSize, MaxSSEBufferSize)
CHANGELOG entry covering HTTP module, streaming, signing, security limits, and cross-cutting changes

findings.issue: No PLang .goal examples for HTTP module steps
findings.detail: PLang examples are the tester's responsibility. HTTP module needs example .goal files showing request, download, upload, configure, and streaming usage.
